evals.name: code-review-large-session
evals.prompt: I just ran /code-review on a PR and it felt slow with a lot of repeated work between specialists. Can you audit this transcript and tell me what's wrong with the plugin? Path: /Users/jfatras/.claude/projects/-Users-jfatras-Projects-Claude/610ffbea-ba91-4fd4-bbce-120cb48c363c.jsonl
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers, parser runs, four specialists spawn in parallel, findings written per category, proposals.md drafted with options + pros/cons per finding, asks user before implementing.

assertions.name: parser_output_exists
assertions.description: parsed.json present with session_id, plugins_used, stats, events

assertions.name: all_four_specialist_findings_files_exist
assertions.description: findings/{permissions,errors,tool-failures,orchestration}.md all present

assertions.name: proposals_doc_exists
assertions.description: proposals.md present

assertions.name: proposals_have_structured_options
assertions.description: Every proposal: Problem + Evidence + 2+ Options + Recommendation

assertions.name: every_option_has_pros_and_cons
assertions.description: Every Option block has both Pros and Cons with at least one bullet each

assertions.name: evidence_cites_specific_artifacts
assertions.description: Each Evidence cites a tool_use_id, timestamp, or file path

assertions.name: no_plugin_source_modified
assertions.description: No files under plugins/ were modified during the run

assertions.name: no_version_bump_during_audit
assertions.description: No plugins/*/.claude-plugin/plugin.json files were modified

evals.name: code-review-medium-session
evals.prompt: Look at /Users/jfatras/.claude/projects/-Users-jfatras-Projects-Claude/3f49a2cb-80aa-407c-b3e0-4eff66ad0354.jsonl — figure out if any of my plugins had issues during that session and propose fixes.
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers, parser runs, specialists spawn, findings consolidated. May surface fewer findings than the large-session test if the run was clean — that is a valid outcome.

assertions.name: parser_output_exists
assertions.description: parsed.json present

assertions.name: all_four_specialist_findings_files_exist
assertions.description: findings/{permissions,errors,tool-failures,orchestration}.md all present

assertions.name: proposals_doc_exists
assertions.description: proposals.md present

assertions.name: proposals_have_structured_options_or_explicit_no_findings
assertions.description: If there are proposals, each has Problem/Evidence/2+ Options/Recommendation. If clean, doc says so explicitly without fabricating proposals.

assertions.name: every_option_has_pros_and_cons
assertions.description: Every Option block has Pros + Cons (vacuous if no proposals)

assertions.name: no_plugin_source_modified
assertions.description: No files under plugins/ were modified

assertions.name: no_version_bump_during_audit
assertions.description: No plugin.json files were modified

evals.name: no-plugin-session-bailout
evals.expected_output: Skill detects plugins_used is empty, surfaces this to the user before doing further work, asks them to confirm the file path or scope. Does NOT spawn specialists or write a proposals doc.

assertions.name: parser_output_exists_with_empty_plugins_used
assertions.description: parsed.json exists; plugins_used is empty

assertions.name: no_specialists_spawned
assertions.description: findings/ absent or empty — skill bailed before spawning specialists

assertions.name: no_proposals_doc_written
assertions.description: proposals.md absent — no fabricated proposals from non-plugin session

assertions.name: bailout_note_or_explanation_present
assertions.description: An explanatory note exists in outputs/ OR the agent's reply surfaced the empty result

assertions.name: no_plugin_source_modified
assertions.description: No plugins/ files modified
